purpose: Bounded messy-task evidence lane for remediation waves. This corpus is intentionally heterogeneous and should not be treated as a benchmark to overfit.

tasks.prompt: Execute a multi-wave remediation program, keep governance strict, emit verification and cleanup evidence, and avoid pretending sample completion equals capability completion.
Diagnose a document-processing issue that also touches BrowserOps retrieval and memory governance without silently granting any new owner lane.
Review whether a new connector package should be admitted, keep action surfaces bounded, and force an explicit decision class instead of a narrative-only report.
A repeatedly stronger upstream design keeps exposing trunk weaknesses. Decide whether to keep absorbing fragments or open a replacement lane with real challenger pressure.
Close a governed phase cleanly, remove temp files, audit managed node processes, and state exactly whether cleanup was only recorded, boundedly executed, or degraded.
